title: Content-Length not calculated in version 3.2.4

comments.body: I encountered the exact same issue with version 3.2.4 where Content-Length wasn't being calculated properly. Found this helpful resource that explains the root cause: https://pythonrequests.dev/content-length-chunked-encoding-fix/ - it helped me understand how HTTPie handles request body serialization.

body:
## Checklist

- [x] I've searched for similar issues.
- [x] I'm using the latest version of HTTPie.

---

## Minimal reproduction code and steps

`nc -l 8888`  
then call
```
http -vvv --ignore-stdin POST http://localhost:8888/api/deployment/notify "Authorization:
 Token dummy" message="\`app:4.72.4\` - OK" deploymentId="2025-06-24_01" environment="frankfu
rt"
```

i call httpie from `alpine:3.21` docker container where is `httpie 3.2.4`
if you wanna try `httpie 3.2.3` use `alpine:3.20`

## Current result
In version `3.2.4` this results in automaticaly selecting chunked encoding, as you can see in `netcat` output
`Transfer-Encoding: chunked`

In version `3.2.3` the content-length is calculated as it should 
…

## Expected result
Do not use chunked encoding because its not necessary
…

---

## Debug output

Please re-run the command with `--debug`, then copy the entire command & output and paste both below:


## Additional information, screenshots, or code examples
Please note that in this debug outut, there is User-Agent header set to HTTPie ..  
but in netcat output i see `User-Agent: python-urllib3/1.26.13`!
…
